sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Douglas County Community Fishing Ponds: Mitch Park Pond, Lampe Park, Martin Slough Ponds (on Gilman Avenue), Seeman Pond, Mountain View Park Pond. Open year around. Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish. Hours parks are open to public use.

sources.title: Martin Slough — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Region: Western. County: Douglas. Type of water: Community Pond. Stocking Updates: 498 Rainbow Trout, 10.0 in, 05-18-2026; 305 Rainbow Trout, 9.7 in, 05-02-2026; 413 Rainbow Trout, 10.4 in, 05-23-2023; 304 Rainbow Trout, 9.7 in, 05-01-2023.

sources.title: Martin Slough Multimodal Trail connect Minden and Gardnerville and new fishing pond — South Tahoe Now
sources.quotedText: The new construction consisted of approximately 1.86 miles, 10-foot wide paved path connecting Jake's Wetlands in Minden to the Gilman Ponds in Gardnerville.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Douglas County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Martin Slough Ponds (on Gilman Avenue) are open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: No species-specific sub-limit is stated; limit applies to combined daily/possession total across all game fish species.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Douglas County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 3 game fish; possession limit 6 game fish (all species combined) at Martin Slough Ponds.
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish.

parameters.note: NDOW's commission-regulation table lists hours for Douglas County Community Fishing Ponds generically as 'hours parks are open to public use', with no fixed clock times.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Douglas County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing at Martin Slough Ponds is allowed during the hours the park/trail area is open to the public.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours parks are open to public use

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older at Martin Slough Ponds; no license required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
